title: Select Two or More Plans for Comparison from Plan Catalog
description: The system shall allow users to select two or more plans for comparison from the Plan Catalog. Each plan row shall have a checkbox. A [Compare Selected] button activates when 2 or more plans are selected.
navigationPattern: Plan Catalog → Select Plans → [Compare Selected] → Dedicated Comparison View

title: Support Comparison of Up to Four Plans Simultaneously
description: The system shall support comparison of up to four plans simultaneously. Beyond four columns, readability degrades on standard laptop screens. Horizontal scrolling is acceptable for narrow viewports.
underMinimumMessage: Select at least 2 plans to compare.
overMaximumMessage: You can compare up to 4 plans at a time. Please deselect 1 plan.

title: Dedicated Plan Comparison View — Not a Modal
description: The system shall provide a dedicated Plan Comparison view rather than relying solely on a modal dialog. A modal is too constrained for benefits plans with many attributes.
rationale: Benefits plan comparison has many attributes across multiple categories. A dedicated page provides better readability and navigation than a constrained modal.

title: Side-by-Side Column Layout for Plan Comparison
description: The Plan Comparison view shall display plans as side-by-side columns. Each column represents one plan. Attribute rows run horizontally across all columns.

title: Plan Comparison Attributes Organized into Logical Categories
description: The system shall organize comparison attributes into logical collapsible categories.

title: 'Differences Only' Mode — Hide Identical Values
description: The system shall provide a 'Differences Only' mode that hides attributes with identical values across all selected plans, making it easier to compare 3–4 plans with many shared attributes.
differencesOnlyToggle: Switch hides rows where all plan values are identical

title: Visually Identify and Accessibly Label Differences Between Plans
description: The system shall visually identify differences between plans using both visual indicators and accessible text labels. Do not rely solely on color for difference indication.

title: Sticky Plan Column Headers While Scrolling
description: Plan headers shall remain visible while users scroll through the comparison table.

title: Navigate from Comparison View to Individual Plan Detail
description: Users shall be able to navigate from the comparison view to the detailed configuration of an individual plan via a [View Plan Details] action per plan column.

title: Select Plan from Comparison and Return to Enrollment Workflow Without Losing State
description: When comparison is initiated from an enrollment workflow, users shall be able to select a plan and return to the enrollment workflow without losing enrollment state.
enrollmentReturnBehavior: After [Select PPO 500], enrollment wizard resumes at the plan selection step with PPO 500 pre-selected.

title: Block Comparison When Fewer Than Two Plans Are Selected
description: The system shall prevent comparison when fewer than two plans are selected and display a clear message.

title: Notify User When More Than Four Plans Selected and Require Reduction
description: The system shall notify users when more than four plans are selected and require them to reduce the selection to four or fewer before launching comparison.

title: Optional AI-Generated Comparison Summary Based Exclusively on Structured Plan Data
description: The system shall optionally provide an AI-generated comparison summary. The summary shall be based exclusively on the structured plan data being compared, and shall not invent or generalize beyond what is in the plan records.

aiSummaryExample.content: PPO 500 has the lowest deductible but the highest employee premium. HDHP 3000 has the lowest employee premium and is HSA eligible, but has the highest deductible. PPO 1000 provides a middle-ground option.
aiSummaryExample.disclaimer: AI-generated explanation based on plan configuration data.

title: AI Comparison Summary Identifies the Underlying Plan Attributes Used
description: AI-generated comparison summaries shall identify the underlying plan attributes used to generate the summary, ensuring the user can verify the basis of the AI's conclusions.
exampleAttributeSource: Source: Plan Configuration → HDHP 3000 → HSA Eligibility = true
